cases.section: PRINT PREVIEWS SCREEN
cases.description: Printer Reconnection Flow and State Persistence
steps: 3. Reach ON_01E and tap Get Started!.
4. Ensure printer is offline and open Print Preview screen.
5. Apply edits such as crop, rotation, zoom, or video frame selection.
6. Tap Reconnect Printer and navigate through Connection Options, Discovery, and Connection Success screens.
cases.expected: All preview edits (crop, rotation, zoom, video frame selection) are preserved throughout reconnection flow. Printer status updates to online and user is redirected back to Print Preview screen.

verifications.description: Printer Reconnection Flow and State Persistence
verifications.expected: All preview edits (crop, rotation, zoom, video frame selection) are preserved throughout reconnection flow. Printer status updates to online and user is redirected back to Print Preview screen.
verifications.verification: Verify visible: Printer
